allow: Bash(ruby -e "require_relative ''lib/adapters/registry''; puts VendorBridge::Adapters::Registry.available.inspect; config = VendorBridge::Adapters::Registry.fetch\(''iheartjane''\); puts config[''label'']; puts config[''field_mapping''].length.to_s + '' field mappings''; config[''field_mapping''].each { |m| puts ""  #{m[''posabit'']} <- #{m[''vendor'']}"" }; puts config[''category_mapping''].inspect")
